arts.ttl: Conceiçao: “You cannot work at Milan if, after winning a Supercoppa, you feel satisfied”
arts.sum: AC Milan's new manager Sergio Conceicao is keeping his feet firmly on the ground following the team's Supercoppa Italiana triumph in Saudi Arabia. The Portuguese coach is already focused on the upcoming Serie A match against Cagliari and the challenge of securing Champions League qualification. arts.ttl: “You try in every way” – Manager on work to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been linked to multiple clubs in the January transfer widow, with Manchester United seemingly ready to part ways with their homegrown attacker. AC Milan and Borussia Dortmund have been repeatedly linked this week, although German reports pretty much dismissed the idea of serious interest from BVB. arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan v Cagliari: Match Preview
arts.sum: The San Siro is set to host a crucial Serie A clash as AC Milan welcome Cagliari on Saturday evening. The Rossoneri enter this fixture riding high on confidence after their recent Supercoppa Italiana triumph, while the Sardinians aim to build on their latest victory and climb further away from the relegation zone.
